case_title: BARBOUR, CAROLE VS ROBERT KOCH GALLERY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,223.00 FILED BY BARBOUR, CAROLE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT KOCH GALLERY KOCH, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOCH, ROBERT
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROBERT KOCH GALLERY KOCH, ROBERT AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BARBOUR, CAROLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARBOUR, CAROLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOCH, ROBERT $1,824.22 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,844.22, DEFT BREACHED THE SUBLEASE & CAUSED DAMAGE TO PLTF AS FOLLOWS: $723.32 PRO RATED RENTAL COMMISION; STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KOCH, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BARBOUR, CAROLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KOCH, ROBERT
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KOCH, ROBERT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT KOCH GALLERY
